transcript:
CALLER: Hello, mujhe apni appointment cancel karni hai. Meri tabiyat theek nahi hai aur main aa nahi sakta.
AGENT: Koi baat nahi. Pehle aap theek ho jaiye. Aapka naam aur appointment details?
CALLER: Rajan Nair. Aaj shaam ko 6 baje tha. Dr. Arun Mahajan ke saath.
AGENT: Haan dekha. Rajan Nair, aaj 6 PM, Dr. Mahajan. Cancel kar doon completely?
CALLER: Haan, aur jab main theek ho jaaunga toh nayi date le loonga.
AGENT: Bilkul. Cancel ho gaya. Jab chahein call kar ke nayi appointment le lena. Jaldi sehat theek ho aapki.
CALLER: Shukriya. Bahut acha service hai aapka.
